tasks.title: Documentar recursos do ESAA e guia de uso com Codex/Claude Code
tasks.description: Produzir documentacao de uso do ESAA cobrindo: (1) referencia de cada subcomando do CLI esaa (bootstrap, init, run, submit, claim, complete, review, state, dispatch-context, reject, task, issue, hotfix, activity, process, project, verify, chain, eligible, metrics, input, plugin, roadmap, plugin-status, effects, runner, scenario, vocabulary, snapshot, replay) com proposito, sintaxe e exemplo; (2) guia pratico de como usar o ESAA num projeto novo (bootstrap/init ate o ciclo todo->in_progress->review->done); (3) guia de como operar Codex e Claude Code como runners externos (provenance --runner, dispatch-context, input commands/runtime_capabilities, runner metrics, envelope agent.result e two-step claim/complete); (4) motivacao: porque usar o ESAA e quais problemas cada recurso resolve (tabela recurso/para-que-serve/problema-que-resolve).

checks: docs/guides/esaa-cli-reference.md documenta os 29 subcomandos do esaa --help real (0.5.0b9) com proposito, sintaxe e exemplos, incluindo state, process, scenario, vocabulary e reject
docs/guides/esaa-getting-started.md cobre instalacao via pip, bootstrap/init e o ciclo completo todo->in_progress->review->done com exemplos executaveis

docs/guides/esaa-runners-codex-claude-code.md cobre provenance --runner, input commands/runtime_capabilities, dispatch-context, envelope agent.result, two-step claim/complete, gates WG-001..005 e runner metrics
docs/guides/esaa-why.md apresenta a tabela recurso/para-que-serve/problema-que-resolve cobrindo todos os recursos do core

tasks.title: Specify task lessons and typed review model
tasks.description: Criar docs/spec/G07-task-lessons-review-model.md como especificacao canonica, backward-compatible, para evoluir task model, lessons e review tipado. A spec deve definir task_type, acceptance_criteria, required_review_mode, supersedes e superseded_by; Projection Rules; Validation Timing; Lessons Contract; Canonical Examples; Non-Goals. A entrega e documental: nao implementar core nesta task.

checks: Dispatch-context example represents required_verification as an object with checks rather than a bare array
Canonical Examples section states examples use current ESAA-Core names task_id, task_kind, task.create and action review
Backward Compatibility states legacy lessons shapes are accepted and normalized internally without manual migration
Spec still contains Projection Rules, Validation Timing, Lessons Contract, Canonical Examples and Non-Goals

tasks.title: Implement G07 schema contracts
tasks.description: Implementar a camada de schema da G07 conforme docs/spec/G07-task-lessons-review-model.md. Atualizar schemas/templates para aceitar campos opcionais backward-compatible de task e review: task_type, acceptance_criteria, required_review_mode, supersedes e review_mode. Nao implementar ainda regras completas de projector/CLI alem do necessario para os schemas e testes de schema. Validar que roadmaps/eventos antigos continuam aceitos e que enums invalidas falham no schema apropriado.

checks: PYTHONPATH=/tmp/esaa-g07-impl-001/src python -m pytest -q /tmp/esaa-g07-impl-001/tests/test_g07_schema_contracts.py -> 5 passed
roadmap.schema.json accepts legacy tasks without G07 fields and optional G07 task fields with valid enums
agent_result.schema.json accepts review_mode for review events and rejects invalid review_mode enum

tasks.title: Implement G07 task model projection and task create CLI
tasks.description: Implementar os campos opcionais de task da G07 no fluxo task.create e no projector. task create deve aceitar --task-type, --acceptance-criterion repetivel, --required-review-mode e --supersedes repetivel. O projector deve preservar campos autorados e derivar superseded_by como lista projection-only em ordem de eventos. Validacoes: supersedes exige task existente no momento do task.create, rejeita self-reference e duplicados antes de append; supersedes nao altera status da task referenciada; campos ausentes nao viram null incompatibil. Manter compatibilidade com eventos antigos.

checks: Temporary full-copy validation: PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest -q tests/test_g07_task_model.py tests/test_g07_schema_contracts.py -> 9 passed

Regression validation: PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest -q tests/test_deterministic_cli_commands.py tests/test_projection_workflow.py tests/test_state_machine_and_dispatch.py tests/test_g07_task_model.py tests/test_g07_schema_contracts.py -> 28 passed
supersedes validation rejects missing targets, self-reference and duplicates before append without changing event count
projector derives superseded_by as an ordered list and preserves superseded task status

tasks.title: Implement G07 typed review mode validation
tasks.description: Implementar review tipado conforme G07. O CLI review deve aceitar --review-mode opcional. Se a task possuir required_review_mode, todo review approve ou request_changes deve informar review_mode igual; ausencia, divergencia ou enum invalida deve falhar antes de append e nao gerar evento. Se a task nao exigir modo, review_mode valido pode ser informado e deve ser preservado no evento para replay/auditoria. Atualizar validator/projector conforme necessario mantendo compatibilidade com reviews antigos sem review_mode.

checks: Temporary validation: PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest -q tests/test_g07_review_mode.py tests/test_g07_task_model.py tests/test_g07_schema_contracts.py tests/test_review_role_policy.py tests/test_event_hash_chain.py tests/test_reject_codes_inventory.py -> 34 passed
review without required review_mode and review with mismatched mode fail before append with canonical codes
request_changes and approve both require matching review_mode when required_review_mode is set
valid optional review_mode on tasks without required_review_mode is preserved in admitted review payload

tasks.title: Implement G07 lessons contract and dispatch context
tasks.description: Implementar o contrato de lessons e dispatch-context da G07. Atualizar lessons.schema para status active, experimental, superseded e archived; scope com task_kinds, task_types, review_modes, paths, actors e runners; enforcement como objeto extensivel com mode/value e compatibilidade com shape legado. Implementar filtro: OR dentro da mesma dimensao e AND entre dimensoes. active entra no contexto e pode bloquear; experimental entra sem bloquear por padrao; superseded/archived nao entram no contexto normal. dispatch-context deve expor campos G07 para spec/impl/qa, incluindo superseded_by como dado de leitura. require_boundary_grant deve ser documentado/representado sem conceder permissao automaticamente.

checks: Temporary focused validation: PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest -q tests/test_g07_lessons_dispatch.py tests/test_dispatch_context_cache_order.py tests/test_baseline_lessons_seed.py tests/test_activity_clear_lessons_reseed.py -> 13 passed

Temporary combined G07 validation: PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest -q tests/test_g07_lessons_dispatch.py tests/test_g07_review_mode.py tests/test_g07_task_model.py tests/test_g07_schema_contracts.py tests/test_dispatch_context_cache_order.py tests/test_baseline_lessons_seed.py tests/test_activity_clear_lessons_reseed.py -> 26 passed
filter_lessons includes active and experimental lessons, excludes superseded/archived, and applies OR within dimensions plus AND across dimensions
dispatch-context exposes task_type, acceptance_criteria, required_review_mode, supersedes and superseded_by as read context

tasks.title: Document G07 task model and typed review usage
tasks.description: Atualizar documentacao de usuario apos a implementacao G07. Documentar uso de task create com task_type, acceptance_criteria, required_review_mode e supersedes; uso de review --review-mode; comportamento de superseded_by projection-only; lessons status/scope/enforcement; compatibilidade com roadmaps e lessons legadas. Nao alterar core nesta task.

checks: CLI reference documents task create G07 flags, review --review-mode validation, and lessons enforcement shape.
Getting started guides show optional G07 fields and typed review behavior in Portuguese and English.

tasks.title: QA G07 task model lessons and typed review implementation
tasks.description: Validar a implementacao completa da G07 contra docs/spec/G07-task-lessons-review-model.md.
